name: Solace Browser — Yinyang
description: AI browsing companion. Follows you everywhere.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src http://localhost:8888 http://127.0.0.1:8888 ws://localhost:8888 ws://127.0.0.1:8888; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none';
